topics: Fully Connected Layers, Feature and Weight Visualization
Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN): Cell Structure and Architecture
Back-propagation Through Time, Vanishing and Exploding Gradients
Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM): Architecture and Training

Training Transformer Models, Large Language Models, BERT

GPT (Detailed Mathematical Treatment Not Required for This Module). Note: Assignments/Micro Project should be given for modules 2, 3 and 4 using standard machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow/Keras/PyTorch. They may also be introduced to GPUs and standard data sets on Hugging Face/Kaggle
